prompt: A dreamy watercolor double-exposure illustration where the main shape is the side profile silhouette of a young anime girl facing left. Inside her silhouette is a rich, layered fantasy world. At the top is a grand white castle with multiple spires under a starry night sky with a crescent moon. Below the castle, two cloaked figures stand in a mystical forest. In the center, a young female mage with pink hair holding a glowing magical staff stands prominently. To the left of the mage, a white horse is visible. At the bottom of the silhouette is a fantasy village surrounded by blooming cherry blossom trees, with a large open spellbook and a sword resting in the foreground. The artwork features a soft pastel purples, pinks, and blues color palette. The background outside the silhouette is textured parchment with soft watercolor splatters and fading cherry blossom petals, with the signature "tamanyo" written in cursive at the bottom left.
